requirements.title: VPS hardening OS, firewall and fail2ban
requirements.liveProof: Run vps-hardening-ubuntu.sh --apply and vps-host-readiness.sh --enforce on the VPS Ubuntu LTS VPS.

requirements.title: Real DNS and domain preflight
requirements.liveProof: Run production-preflight with final production domains after Cloudflare DNS is configured.

requirements.title: Public HTTPS and ACME readiness
requirements.liveProof: Verify issued certificates and run certificate-expiry-check against the live domain set.

requirements.title: Integrated secrets manager and mounted secrets
requirements.liveProof: Materialize production Docker secrets from the encrypted store and run managed-secrets-preflight.

requirements.title: Credential rotation and secret scan
requirements.liveProof: Rotate production secrets according to the runbook and keep rotation evidence.

requirements.title: Private registry and immutable production images
requirements.liveProof: Publish signed digest-pinned release images to the production registry.

requirements.title: Remote CI/CD and controlled deployment
requirements.liveProof: Configure GitHub environments, secrets and deployment approvals on the live repository.

requirements.title: Off-site backup and restore drill
requirements.liveProof: Configure a remote Restic repository and archive a successful full off-site restore report.

requirements.title: Real alerting on email, Telegram or provider channels
requirements.liveProof: Send and archive a real alert delivery to the production notification channel.

requirements.title: Centralized logs, redaction and audit trail
requirements.liveProof: Verify production log retention, alert routing and audit export during go-live.

requirements.title: WAF, rate limiting and bot protection
requirements.liveProof: Apply Cloudflare WAF rules and pass WAF smoke tests from the public edge.

requirements.title: RBAC and admin authorization
requirements.liveProof: Run access-review monthly and after every admin change.

requirements.title: Account recovery, passkeys and backup codes
requirements.liveProof: Run account integration tests against staging before production promotion.

requirements.title: Production email and SPF/DKIM/DMARC checklist
requirements.liveProof: Verify production DNS email records and SMTP alert delivery.

requirements.title: Controlled database migrations
requirements.liveProof: Run migrations through the controlled deploy flow and archive schema_migrations output.

requirements.title: GDPR and privacy data lifecycle
requirements.liveProof: Review and rehearse account export/deletion and audit unlink procedures.

requirements.title: SAST, DAST, dependency and container scan
requirements.liveProof: Run ZAP against staging and archive dependency/container scan evidence.

requirements.title: Application penetration test readiness
requirements.liveProof: Schedule and archive an external professional penetration test before enterprise launch.

requirements.title: Load and performance test
requirements.liveProof: Run 50/100/500-user public edge benchmark and archive edge evidence.

requirements.title: Incident runbook and RTO/RPO
requirements.liveProof: Run dr-evidence --enforce after live backup and restore evidence exists.

requirements.title: HA and multi-node readiness
requirements.liveProof: Deploy to a real multi-node target or document the accepted single-node VPS risk.

requirements.title: Zero-downtime deploy and rollback
requirements.liveProof: Archive a release evidence pack with previous image digests and rollback dry-run.

requirements.title: Staging separated from production
requirements.liveProof: Deploy the staging overlay to a separate host/project before production.

requirements.title: Feature flags and kill switches
requirements.liveProof: Confirm each risky feature has an operational disable path before go-live.

requirements.title: SIEM and security monitoring export
requirements.liveProof: Connect production logs/alerts to the chosen external SIEM or monitoring provider.

requirements.title: Vulnerability disclosure
requirements.liveProof: Publish the security contact and response process for the production domain.

requirements.title: Supply-chain SBOM, signing and provenance
requirements.liveProof: Verify signed production images, SBOM and SLSA provenance in every release evidence pack.

requirements.title: Compliance GDPR/SOC2-like evidence
requirements.liveProof: Have the evidence bundle and operational controls reviewed by an external auditor if formal compliance is required.

requirements.title: Data classification
requirements.liveProof: Review production datasets and update classification whenever new data types are introduced.

requirements.title: Periodic access review
requirements.liveProof: Archive monthly access-review output and reconcile admin access with Cloudflare/GitHub/VPS users.
